boundary_notes: No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, and no operational targeting are used.
Counter checks remain governance checks only and introduce no operational biological content.
No real host range, infectivity, immune evasion, or biological capability claim is introduced.
The check only concerns abstract manuscript-governance text.
Traceability remains a planning artifact only.
Rubric content remains about manuscript governance only.
No safety exclusion is removed or narrowed.
No new citation is added and no unsupported literature claim is introduced.
No manuscript file is modified by this plan.
Reproducibility remains limited to safe abstract toy artifact generation.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not treat lineage completeness as scientific validation, external validation, or submission readiness.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether planned manuscript artifacts can be traced through safe abstract toy-only lineage records.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless fraction of expected safe artifact stages represented in the toy lineage table.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Inspect safe artifact identifiers, stage labels, and source links in toy metadata records.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, and no operational targeting are used.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not treat zero-counter preservation as proof of real-world safety or biological non-risk.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether forbidden counters remain zero across planned toy governance artifacts.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless pass fraction over counters that must remain zero.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Compare declared forbidden counters against an expected zero-counter registry.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: Counter checks remain governance checks only and introduce no operational biological content.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Synthetic counter dictionaries generated by safe artifact builders.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not infer that blocked-claim coverage makes the manuscript accepted, ready, or externally supported.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether prohibited and deferred claim families are explicitly blocked in toy manuscript governance records.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless fraction of blocked claim families represented by explicit blocked-interpretation notes.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Match blocked claim labels against safe governance records without adding new claims.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: No real host range, infectivity, immune evasion, or biological capability claim is introduced.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Synthetic claim-boundary and gap-register text records.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not treat section consistency as readability proof or reviewer approval.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether manuscript preview sections preserve their intended safe usage boundaries.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless fraction of preview sections whose boundary note matches the intended safe use.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Compare section headings, usage boundaries, and blocked expansion notes in toy metadata.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: The check only concerns abstract manuscript-governance text.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Audited section draft metadata and assembled preview section records.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not claim that mapping a gap resolves the gap or completes an evidence upgrade.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether high-priority scientific gaps are mapped to future evaluation modules.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless fraction of P0/P1 gaps mapped to at least one planned toy evaluation design module.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Link gap IDs to planned evaluation modules by non-operational labels.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: Traceability remains a planning artifact only.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Safe abstract gap-register entries and planned evaluation module entries.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not treat a rubric score as peer-review acceptance or impact evidence.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether the manuscript preview distinguishes governance contribution, claim control, and patch control.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless rubric score over presence of safe contribution components.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Apply a toy rubric to section labels and safe contribution phrases.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: Rubric content remains about manuscript governance only.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Synthetic rubric rows over preview section text.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not soften limitations or convert limitations into readiness language.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether limitations remain explicit while still preserving a readable safe contribution narrative.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless rubric score over explicit exclusions, non-readiness statements, and contribution preservation.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Score toy text features without weakening any exclusion.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: No safety exclusion is removed or narrowed.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Synthetic rubric rows over limitation and contribution section text.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not treat citation slots as actual citations or literature support.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether future citation slots can be represented without fabricating references.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless fraction of citation-needing claims mapped to placeholder slots marked unresolved.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Create a future mapping design for citation slots without adding citation content.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: No new citation is added and no unsupported literature claim is introduced.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Synthetic citation-slot placeholders and gap-family labels.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not treat this design as permission to modify a manuscript file.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether any future manuscript mutation remains blocked until authorization criteria exist.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless pass indicator that manuscript mutation remains blocked in the design plan.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Verify that no application permission, checklist execution, applied patch, or manuscript mutation is present.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: No manuscript file is modified by this plan.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Synthetic mutation-gate records and patch-permission counters.

evaluation_modules.blocked_interpretation: Do not include wet-lab protocols, real biological workflows, or actionable biosafety-risk procedures.
evaluation_modules.design_goal: Check whether a future safe reproducibility package can describe toy artifact generation without operational content.
evaluation_modules.metric_definition: Unitless fraction of safe reproducibility components represented by non-operational descriptions.
evaluation_modules.planned_procedure: Map safe script names, artifact names, and output labels to a future reproducibility description.
evaluation_modules.safety_boundary: Reproducibility remains limited to safe abstract toy artifact generation.
evaluation_modules.toy_input_type: Synthetic safe artifact generation notes and validation-script labels.

non_readiness_disclaimer: This v8.217 artifact designs a future safe abstract toy evaluation only. It does not execute the evaluation, produce evaluation results, validate scientific claims, complete evidence upgrades, add citations, modify manuscript files, approve readiness, or introduce real-biological operational capability.
title: Safe Abstract Toy Evaluation Design Plan
